characters.appearance: Young Asian woman with a slim build and fair complexion. She has dark hair styled in a tight, high bun. Her facial features are smooth and symmetrical.
characters.wardrobe: She wears a solid, light pink hooded sweatshirt throughout the video.
characters.demeanor: Engaged, slightly hesitant when answering questions, but eager to learn.

characters.appearance: Humanoid robot with a smooth, glossy white face and head casing. It has glowing blue eyes and exposed metallic, mechanical joints in the neck area.
characters.wardrobe: None, it is a bare robotic shell.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English fluency का सबसे पहला rule क्या है? [What is the first rule of English fluency?]
Character B says: रटना छोड़ो, बोलना शुरू करो! रोज़ practice करना ज़रूरी है। [Stop cramming, start speaking! Daily practice is essential.]
Character A says: पर किसके साथ? [But with whom?]
Character B says: Supernova AI tutor के साथ। [With Supernova AI tutor.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a common question about English fluency.
- Introduces the core philosophy of the app: speaking over studying.
- Positions Supernova as the immediate, accessible solution to the problem of finding a speaking partner.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: ENGLISH FLUENCY का सबसे पहला RULE क्या है? (WHAT IS THE FIRST RULE OF ENGLISH FLUENCY?) रटना छोड़ो, बोलना शुरू करो! (STOP CRAMMING, START SPEAKING!) रोज़ PRACTICE करना ज़रूरी है। (DAILY PRACTICE IS ESSENTIAL.) पर किसके साथ? (BUT WITH WHOM?) SUPERNOVA AI TUTOR के साथ (WITH SUPERNOVA AI TUTOR)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: How old are you? [How old are you?]
Character A says: Umm.. I have 22. [Umm.. I have 22.]
Character B says: आप शायद कहना चाहती हैं: "I'm 22", है ना? [You probably want to say: "I'm 22", right?]
Character A says: अरे हाँ, 'I'm 22'. [Oh yes, 'I'm 22'.]
Character B says: Neha, where are you from? [Neha, where are you from?]
Character A says: Uhh... I am India. [Uhh... I am India.]
Character B says: Neha, अच्छी कोशिश की, लेकिन सही तरीका है: "I am from India". [Neha, good try, but the correct way is: "I am from India".]
Character A says: Sorry, मैं अक्सर अटक जाती हूँ। I am from India. [Sorry, I often get stuck. I am from India.]
Character B says: कोई बात नहीं, हम रोज़ साथ में बोलकर आपकी English improve करेंगे। [No worries, we will improve your English by speaking together every day.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's core feature: real-time, conversational AI practice.
- Shows the AI correcting common mistakes gently, reinforcing a safe, non-judgmental learning environment.
- Builds emotional resonance by validating the learner's struggle and offering continuous support.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: How old are you? Umm.. I have 22 आप शायद कहना चाहती हैं: "I'm 22", है ना? अरे हाँ, 'I'm 22' Neha, where are you from? I am India Neha, अच्छी कोशिश की, लेकिन सही तरीका है: "I am from India" Sorry, मैं अक्सर अटक जाती हूँ। I am from India कोई बात नहीं, हम रोज़ साथ में बोलकर आपकी English improve करेंगे।

scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a clear call-to-action to download the app.
- Displays app store availability to drive immediate conversions.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: अभी DOWNLOAD करें! बोलना शुरू करें (DOWNLOAD NOW! START SPEAKING) Supernova App Store से डाउनलोड करें (Download on the App Store) Google Play से प्राप्त करें (GET IT ON Google Play)
